nodes.label: Socket.IO Room-Based Architecture Decision
nodes.rationale: 1 session = 1 Socket.IO room gives native scoping, automatic cleanup, participant limit enforcement, and server-side selective broadcasting for privacy (FR-023); namespaces and app-level filtering rejected.

nodes.label: Connection State Recovery Decision
nodes.rationale: Socket.IO 4.6+ replays missed events during disconnects up to 2 minutes, handling mobile network interruptions without custom reconnect logic.

nodes.label: Zustand State Management Decision
nodes.rationale: Zustand (<1KB gzipped) with selective subscriptions prevents re-renders on WebSocket updates; Redux (~15KB) and React Context rejected as too heavy or over-rendering.

nodes.label: Contract-First API Testing Decision
nodes.rationale: OpenAPI for REST plus Zod-validated TypeScript discriminated unions for WebSocket, tested with Vitest and vitest-openapi; monorepo shared/ package makes breaking changes fail TypeScript checks.

nodes.label: WCAG 2.2 AA Mobile Accessibility Decision
nodes.rationale: 44x44px touch targets (beyond WCAG's 24px minimum, avoiding rage taps), 4.5:1 contrast, semantic HTML for VoiceOver/TalkBack; AAA rejected as impractical on small screens.
